resume.name: Rowan Smith
resume.title: Software Developer
resume.about: Software developer with over three years of professional experience building and maintaining internal financial systems using C#, ASP.NET, TypeScript, and SQL. Experienced in API integrations, modern frontend frameworks, and Agile development practices. Passionate about writing clean, maintainable code and continuously expanding technical skills.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained internal finance applications using C#, ASP.NET, TypeScript, and SQL.
Built and enhanced user interfaces using React and Redux.
Integrated third-party APIs to support business requirements and extend system functionality.
Maintained and upgraded internal libraries and wrappers to improve stability and performance.
Collaborated in Agile teams through sprints, stand-ups, and planning poker sessions.

experience.title: Table Games Dealer
bullets: Managed high-pressure gaming environments requiring accuracy and attention to detail.
Handled financial transactions and ensured compliance with gaming procedures.

experience.title: Intern
bullets: Contributed to a team project redesigning a website using WordPress.
Produced design documentation and functional specifications.

experience.title: Casual Teacher
bullets: Supervised and marked Programming III (Java) practical and tutorials.
Assisted students with coursework and answered technical questions.
Maintained attendance records and supported assessment processes.

projects.name: Spotify Extended Streaming History Analysis
projects.description: A Python data analysis tool to process and explore Spotify Extended Streaming History exports. Loads and parses raw JSON listening history to generate insights into user music behaviour, including top artists, top tracks, listening timelines, and year-by-year trends. Built with Jupyter Notebook and Python libraries.

projects.name: VibeGame
projects.description: An experimental C# game project where the majority of code was produced by an AI model. Managed, reviewed, and integrated AI-generated components into a playable project structure, demonstrating iterative refinement of AI-generated software.

funProjects.name: Spotify Extended Streaming History Analysis
funProjects.description: A Python data analysis tool to process and explore Spotify Extended Streaming History exports. Loads and parses raw JSON listening history to generate insights into user music behaviour, including top artists, top tracks, listening timelines, and year-by-year trends.

funProjects.name: Ethical UX
funProjects.description: A React and Storybook project exploring dark patterns and better UX alternatives through interactive component examples. Each pattern starts with the deceptive version first, then contrasts it with a more transparent and respectful implementation.
